Title: 96 Minutes
Writer: Yi-Fang Chen, Tzu-Hsuan Hung, Wan-Ju Yang
Actors: Po-Hung Lin, Vivian Sung, Bo-Chieh Wang
Plot: A bomb expert and his fiancée board a train containing explosives, while a scandal-plagued physics teacher takes the same train hoping to reconcile with his wife who left on an earlier train.
